title: Sai baba ji ki  Aarti
intro: Read Shri Sai Baba Ki Aarti and seek the divine blessings of Shri Sai Baba.
description:
Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki,
Parmanand sada survar ki॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Jaaki kripa vipul sukhkari,
Duhkh, shok, sankat, bhay haari.
Shirdi mein avtaar rachaya,
Chamatkar se jag harshaya॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Kitne bhakt sharan mein aaye,
Sab sukh-shanti chirantan paaye.
Bhav dhare jo man mein jaisa,
Paavat anubhav vahi vaisa॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Guru ki udi lagaave tan ko,
Samadhan labhat us man ko.
Sai naam sada jo gaave,
So phal jag mein shashwat paave॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Guruvasar kari puja seva,
Us par kripa karat gurudeva.
Ram, Krishna, Hanuman roop mein,
Janat jo shraddha dhar man mein॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Vividh dharm ke sevak aate,
Darshan kar ichhit phal paate.
Sai Baba ki jai bolo,
Antarman mein anand gholo॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Sai Das aarti gaave,
Base ghar mein sukh-mangal paave॥
॥ Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki ॥

Aarti Shri Sai Guruvar ki,
Parmanand sada survar ki॥
